objective: Materialize and audit the rows_per_family=20 signature diagnostic shard after Wave 43 proved full-pair support reachability.
non_negotiables: The shard remains heuristic diagnostic data, not exact supervision.
Every row must keep target_status=diagnostic_only and supervision_eligible=false.
Schema validation, leakage validation, deterministic floors, and projection inventory must all be recorded before any model experiment uses the shard.
The result must not be described as replay-compatible exact value evidence.

tasks.prompt: Use the existing signature-target diagnostic shard generator at rows_per_family=20 and record the byte hash before Partizan ingestion.
acceptance: Rows are balanced 20/20/20 across local-move, asymmetric-fan, and pawn-phalanx topology families.
The artifact hash is recorded before copying into Partizan.

tasks.prompt: Validate the rpf20 diagnostic shard with the Partizan schema, run leakage reporting, run the full-signature majority floor, and rerun projection inventory.
acceptance: Partizan schema validation accepts all 60 rows.
Split/leakage report has train/dev/test counts 46/11/3 and zero duplicate or cross-split leakage violations.
The full result-signature target floor reports 60 unique labels and unseen dev/test target labels.
Projection inventory reports all 9 candidate projections and does not hide unseen-label counts.

tasks.prompt: Record Wave 44 as a larger audited diagnostic shard and keep promotion blocked until replay-compatible exact target semantics exist.
acceptance: Docs state that Wave 44 proves larger diagnostic materialization and audit, not exact supervision.
Claims C2 and C5 point next to replay-compatible exact value-rule semantics and model baselines.

integration_gates.command: python3 agents/network.py validate && python3 agents/network.py validate-wave agents/waves/wave_44_rpf20_signature_diagnostic_shard.json
integration_gates.success_signal: The Wave 44 plan is internally consistent.

integration_gates.command: python3 agents/label_schema.py validate docs/signature_target_diagnostic_wave_44_rpf20.jsonl && python3 engine/ml_model.py validate-report docs/signature_target_diagnostic_wave_44_rpf20_split_report.json --fail-on-leakage
integration_gates.success_signal: The rpf20 diagnostic shard is schema-valid and leakage-clean under current Partizan gates.
